creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can we close this PR?

This was reported here:

https://github.com/libarchive/libarchive/issues/794

and fixed here:

https://github.com/libarchive/libarchive/commit/024be27d1b299c030e8841bed3002ee07ba9eedc


We already have that code:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/release/11.1.0/contrib/libarchive/tar/write.c?revision=321354&view=markup#l889

In addition, this is a duplicate of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213335 that is already CLOSED.

Thanks
